ggpsychro 0.1.0

  • Reference

    • Plotting psychrometric data
    • Comfort overlays
    • Zones and processes

Package index

Package overview

ggpsychro-package
ggpsychro: A 'ggplot2' Extension for Making Psychrometric Charts

Core chart construction

ggpsychro()
Create a ggpsychro plot
coord_psychro()
Psychrometric coordinates
is.ggpsychro()
Reports whether x is a ggplot object

Psychrometric equation layers and grids

stat_relhum() stat_wetbulb() stat_vappres() stat_specvol() stat_enthalpy()
Calculate psychrometric properties of moist air
geom_grid_relhum() geom_grid_wetbulb() geom_grid_vappres() geom_grid_specvol() geom_grid_enthalpy()
Add psychrometric grid lines
geom_psychro_protractor() guide_psychro_protractor()
Add a psychrometric protractor

Psychrometric data layers

geom_psychro_process() stat_psychro_state()
Draw psychrometric state points or process lines
geom_psychro_zone() stat_psychro_zone()
Draw psychrometric zones
stat_psychro_bin() geom_psychro_tile()
Bin data on psychrometric chart coordinates

Thermal comfort calculations and models

comfort_pmv() comfort_set() comfort_adaptive() comfort_heat_index()
Thermal comfort calculations
comfort_model_pmv() comfort_model_set() comfort_model_adaptive() comfort_model_heat_index()
Comfort model objects
comfort_standard_ashrae55_2017() comfort_standard_en15251_2007()
PMV-based comfort standards
comfort_strategy_givoni()
Givoni bioclimatic strategy

Thermal comfort chart layers

geom_comfort_overlay() geom_comfort_heat_index() geom_comfort_contour() geom_comfort_zone() geom_comfort_pmv_lines() geom_comfort_standard_zone() geom_comfort_givoni() stat_comfort_state()
Comfort overlays for psychrometric charts
scale_fill_comfort_pmv()
Comfort PMV fill scale

Scales, labels, and transformations

scale_drybulb_continuous() scale_humratio_continuous() scale_relhum_continuous() scale_wetbulb_continuous() scale_vappres_continuous() scale_specvol_continuous() scale_enthalpy_continuous()
Transformation object for psychrometric chart
label_drybulb() label_humratio() label_relhum() label_wetbulb() label_vappres() label_specvol() label_enthalpy() drybulb_format() humratio_format() relhum_format() wetbulb_format() vappres_format() specvol_format() enthalpy_format()
Label wet-bulb temperature
drybulb_trans() humratio_trans() relhum_trans() wetbulb_trans() vappres_trans() specvol_trans() enthalpy_trans()
Create transformation objects for psychrometric chart
demo_scale()
Demonstrate scales functions with ggplot2 code

Themes, presets, and elements

theme_grey_psychro() theme_gray_psychro() theme_psychro() theme_psychro_ashrae() theme_psychro_minimal()
Custom theme for psychrometric chart.
psychro_preset()
Apply a psychrometric chart preset
element_polygon()
Polygon theme element for psychrometric chart panels
element_comfort_zone()
Comfort zone style element

Extension API

ggpsychro-extensions StatRelhum StatWetbulb StatVappres StatSpecvol StatEnthalpy StatPsychroBin StatPsychroState StatPsychroZone
ggpsychro extensions to ggplot2
ggpsychro-ggproto CoordPsychro
Base ggproto classes for ggpsychro

On this page
